zh.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Kirby是John Kirby的兒子，於大約1500年出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾斯坦登。他於1519年與Joan在英國結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1555年7月8日在他的家鄉享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀特福爾斯坦登聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Kirby是John Kirby的儿子，于大约1500年出生在英国英格兰賀特福爾斯坦登。他于1519年与Joan在英国结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1555年7月8日在他的家乡享年56岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀特福爾斯坦登聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Kirby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places in northern and eastern England called Kirby or Kirkby, from Old Norse kirkja ‘church’ + bȳ ‘farmstead, village’.
Irish: adopted for Ó Garmhaic ‘descendant of Cíarmhac’, a personal name meaning ‘dark son’. Compare Kerwick .
Irish: Anglicized form of Mac Geirble ‘son of Geirble’, a personal name of uncertain origin. The name is preserved in the townland name of Carrowkeribly in County Mayo.

variants.name: Kerwick
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Garmhaic, more commonly Anglicized as Kirby .

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Kirby was born about 1500, in Standon, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of John Kirby. He married Joan in 1519, in England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 8 July 1555, in his hometown, at the age of 56, and was buried in St Mary's Church, Standon, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 8 juillet 1555, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à St Mary's Church, Standon, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 8. ja.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Kirbyは約1500年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスタンドンでJohn Kirbyの息子として生まれた。1519年にイギリスでJoanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1555年7月8日に故郷で56歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスタンドンスト マリ'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St. Mary's Church, Standon, Hertfordshir: 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 스탠던 스트 마이'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Kirby(은)는 대략 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 스탠던에서 John Kirby의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1519년 영국에서 Joan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1555년 7월 8일 그의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 스탠던 스트 마이'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Kirby родился около 1500 г. в местности стандон, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали John Kirby. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan в 1519 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 8 июля 1555 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мэри'с чурч, стандон, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
